memoryArtifacts.description: This Clayton family member was born about 1440, and according to family history he was disinherited for disobeying his parents.  Title to Clayton Manor fell to his younger brother, Richard.

memoryArtifacts.headline: A Brief History
memoryArtifacts.description: THOMAS de CLAYTON was born about 1390, the eldest son. He married Dorothy Thelwell, daughter of Henry de Dutton and granddaughter of Randle de Dutton, both of which were Lord of Thelwell in Cheshire. …

popularStory.description: This Clayton family member was born about 1440, and according to family history he was disinherited for disobeying his parents.  Title to Clayton Manor fell to his younger brother, Richard.

zh.Clayton ManorLancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾克雷頓
zh.Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Thomas II de Clayton於1390年出生在英國藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲時，他的父親Lord John V de Clayton30歲，母親Dame Mary Fereby25歲。他於大約1418年與Dorothy de Dutton在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1426年在英國藍卡爾克雷頓享年36歲。

zh-hans.Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Thomas II de Clayton于1390年出生在英国藍卡爾克雷頓 勒 伍茲时，他的父亲Lord John V de Clayton30岁，母亲Dame Mary Fereby25岁。他于大约1418年与Dorothy de Dutton在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1426年在英国藍卡爾克雷頓享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clayton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places, in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Staffordshire, and Sussex, named Clayton, from Old English clǣg ‘clay’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cleeton
meanings: English (Shropshire and Worcestershire): variant of   Clayton  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Thomas II de Clayton was born in 1390, in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England, his father, Lord John V de Clayton, was 30 and his mother, Dame Mary Fereby, was 25. He married Dorothy de Dutton about 1418, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1426, in Clayton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Thomas II de Clayton est né en 1390, à Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Lord John V de Clayton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Dame Mary Fereby, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy de Dutton environ 1418, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1426, à Clayton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Thomas II de Clayton 1390 in Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord John V de Clayton 30 und seine Mutter Dame Mary Fereby 25. Er hat um 1418 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Dorothy de Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1426 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Clayton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Thomas II de Clayton è nato il nel 1390 nel Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Lord John V de Clayton, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Dame Mary Fereby, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy de Dutton circa 1418, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1426, nel Clayton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas II de Claytonが1390年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトン ル ウッドスで生まれた時，父Lord John V de Claytonは30歳，母Dame Mary Ferebyは25歳であった。約1418年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでDorothy de Duttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1426年にイギリスランカシュアイアクレイトンで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas II de Clayton(이)가 1390년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴 일 우드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord John V de Clayton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Mary Fereby(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Dorothy de Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1426년 영국 랭카실르 클레이턴에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Clayton ManorLancashire, England: Clayton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Thomas II de Clayton nasceu em 1390, em Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord John V de Clayton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Dame Mary Fereby, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy de Dutton aproximadamente 1418, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1426, em Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Thomas II de Clayton родился в 1390 г. в местности клеитон л вудс, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord John V de Clayton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Mary Fereby, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy de Dutton около 1418 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1426 г. в местности клеитон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Thomas II de Clayton nació en 1390, en Clayton Le Woods, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord John V de Clayton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Dame Mary Fereby, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Dorothy de Dutton aproximadamente 1418, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1426, en Clayton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años.
